channels.name: Colour Wheel
channels.notes: 0-4: Open white (no colour), 5-127: Static colours and split colours, 128-189: Colour wheel rotation forwards (fast-slow), 190-193: Colour wheel stop, 194-255: Colour wheel rotation backwards (slow-fast). Split Colour function affects ranges.

channels.name: Gobo Wheel
channels.notes: 0-6: Open (no gobo), 7-104: Static gobos, 105-202: Gobo shake (slow-fast), 203-255: Continuous gobo scroll (slow-fast).

channels.name: Shutter
channels.notes: 0-31: Shutter closed, 32-63: Shutter open, 64-95: Strobe effect (slow-fast), 96-127: Shutter open, 128-159: Pulse effect (slow-fast), 160-191: Shutter open, 192-223: Random strobe effect (slow-fast), 224-255: Shutter open.

channels.name: Focus
channels.notes: 0-255: Focus close-far.

channels.name: Prism
channels.notes: 0-5: No prism, 6-127: Prism on, 128-189: Prism rotation forwards (fast-slow), 190-193: Prism rotation stop, 194-255: Prism rotation backwards (fast-slow).

channels.name: Frost
channels.notes: 0-199: Frost off, 200-255: Frost on.

channels.name: Pan/Tilt Speed
channels.notes: 0-225: Max. to min. speed, 226-235: Blackout unit when moving, 236-245: Blackout unit when effect wheel moves (colours/gobos/prism), 246-255: No function.

channels.name: Special Functions
channels.notes: 0-79: No function, 80-84: Motor reset all motors, 85-87: Motor reset pan and tilt, 88-90: Colour wheel reset, 91-93: Gobo wheel reset, 94-96: No function, 97-99: Other motor reset (prism, frost), 100-219: Automatic shows 1-6, 220-239: Automatic show 7, 240-255: Music controlled show 1.

channels.name: Colour Wheel
channels.notes: 0-4: Open white (no colour), 5-127: Static colours and split colours, 128-189: Colour wheel rotation forwards (fast-slow), 190-193: Colour wheel stop, 194-255: Colour wheel rotation backwards (slow-fast). Split Colour function affects ranges.

channels.name: Gobo Wheel
channels.notes: 0-6: Open (no gobo), 7-104: Static gobos, 105-202: Gobo shake (slow-fast), 203-255: Continuous gobo scroll (slow-fast).

channels.name: Shutter
channels.notes: 0-31: Shutter closed, 32-63: Shutter open, 64-95: Strobe effect (slow-fast), 96-127: Shutter open, 128-159: Pulse effect (slow-fast), 160-191: Shutter open, 192-223: Random strobe effect (slow-fast), 224-255: Shutter open.

channels.name: Focus
channels.notes: 0-255: Focus close-far.

channels.name: Prism
channels.notes: 0-5: No prism, 6-127: Prism on, 128-189: Prism rotation forwards (fast-slow), 190-193: Prism rotation stop, 194-255: Prism rotation backwards (fast-slow).

channels.name: Frost
channels.notes: 0-199: Frost off, 200-255: Frost on.

channels.name: Pan/Tilt Speed
channels.notes: 0-225: Max. to min. speed, 226-235: Blackout unit when moving, 236-245: Blackout unit when effect wheel moves (colours/gobos/prism), 246-255: No function.

channels.name: Special Functions
channels.notes: 0-79: No function, 80-84: Motor reset all motors, 85-87: Motor reset pan and tilt, 88-90: Colour wheel reset, 91-93: Gobo wheel reset, 94-96: No function, 97-99: Other motor reset (prism, frost), 100-219: Automatic shows 1-6, 220-239: Automatic show 7, 240-255: Music controlled show 1.

channels.name: Colour Wheel Speed
channels.notes: 0-255: Max. to min. speed. Only available in 15-channel mode.

channels.name: Gobo Wheel Speed
channels.notes: 0-255: Max. to min. speed. Only available in 15-channel mode.
